title: New Zealand PM disagrees with Biden, says Xi Jinping not a ‘dictator’
description: SYDNEY (Reuters) - New Zealand Prime Minister Chris Hipkins, ahead of his official trip to China at end of this month, said on Thursday he did not agree with U....
